creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 231550
"git diff" to update the port

- Update 1.57 --> 1.58
Changes: https://metacpan.org/release/JONASBN/Workflow-1.58/source/Changes.md

- "portlint -AC" gives non-relevant warns.
- "portclippy Makefile" is happy.
- "portfmt -D Makefile" is happy.
- Tested with:
12.2-RELEASE-p7
pkg 1.17.5
poudriere 3.3.7_1
perl 5.32.1_1
openssl 1.1.1k
ssl=base
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say: PASS.
